intro: Pycreus colchicus, also known as Marsh Bulrush or Cumbungi, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The health benefits of Pycreus colchicus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues.
